Pariprashnena — Q&A Archive

A read-only archive of 1,235 questions and 14,977 answers from a Gauḍīya Vaiṣṇava forum (2007–2012).

Srimad Bhagavatam Verse Meters

Sadhana · asked by user [] · 2010-04-21 · 5 answers
Is there a compilation of different meters that could be sung while reciting Bhagavatam verses.
user [38] · 2010-04-21
http://www.veda.harekrsna.cz/library/SBmeter.zip
user [366] · 2010-04-22
I was looking for sound recordings of the meters.

That text is difficult to read.
user [38] · 2010-04-22
Theres also built-in audio. Its a difficult subject.
user [366] · 2010-04-29
Thanks, I didnt see the audio.

The only problem left is that the font doesnt appear correct, even though I have the Balarama font working. I use Word 2007.
user [38] · 2010-04-29
Ive checked it in Word 2003. The font is Tamal but still some chars dont show properly.
